name: King Dozer
description: A huge optional lizard hidden in a northeastern cave of Greenhouse Surroundings. It looks calm enough until the fight starts and the whole arena turns into a storm of stomps, tail swings, and spicy fire.
behavior: It opens with bites, stomps, and claw sweeps to dominate the front arc. As it loses health it mixes in tail whips and spicy eye shots, eventually closing space with far more fire pressure.
interactionWithPlayer: It is a boss built around relentless frontal pressure. Standing in front too long exposes you to bites and sweeps, but playing only from behind does not work either because the tail punishes far better than it first appears.
interactionWithCreatures: The fight happens inside its den and revolves almost entirely around King Dozer itself. Everything in the arena is subordinated to the space control created by its large attacks.
strategy: Stay near the front flanks so bites and claw sweeps are easier to read, but abandon the back line as soon as you see the tail loading. The eyes are the most consistent weak point, and explosive damage does a lot to speed up the tense phases.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 100. 3-Bite Combo: 100. Claw Sweep: 140. Stomp: 100. Tail Whip: 70. Eye Spicy Shot: 15. Tongue Lick: 143. Claw Sweep Finisher: 145. Fire Breath: 15.

inflicts: Its physical attacks deal busting damage. The eye shots and breath add spicy fire and burning.
specialTraits: It is immune to environmental sizzle buildup.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick blockable bite used to start short strings.

abilities.name: 3-Bite Combo
abilities.description: Three chained bites that keep constant front-facing pressure.

abilities.name: Claw Sweep
abilities.description: A long, heavy sweep that breaks guard unless you perfect block it.

abilities.name: Stomp
abilities.description: It rises and slams the ground, followed by rocks that punish standing still.

abilities.name: Tail Whip
abilities.description: Its answer to targets behind it; the swing can hit multiple times.

abilities.name: Eye Spicy Shot
abilities.description: A fast projectile fired from the eyes that applies spicy fire.

abilities.name: Fire Breath
abilities.description: Area-denial breath attack used to close off space in the final phase.

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.trigger: Begins when it drops from the ceiling and lands in the arena.
bossPhases.summary: King Dozer opens with bites, stomps and claw sweeps. The pressure is mainly frontal, and the clearest read point remains the head and eyes.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: It still leaves short punish windows after the bite combo or a committed stomp.
newPatterns: Stomps generate falling rocks that punish standing still.
The most consistent weak point remains the eyes.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: Quick bite used to open front-facing pressure.

abilities.name: 3-Bite Combo
abilities.description: Readable chain, but very punishing if you eat the whole thing.

abilities.name: Stomp
abilities.description: Heavy area strike that also calls rocks from above.

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.trigger: At 66% it starts mixing claw and tail pressure much more aggressively to punish flanks and the back line.
bossPhases.summary: The second phase is harsher on sloppy blocks. Claw sweeps and tail whips occupy much more space and make it harder to stay in a comfortable position.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: Guard-breaking attacks become more frequent and punish overcommitting at close range.
newPatterns: Claw Sweep becomes a major threat unless you nail the perfect block.
Tail Whip covers the rear angle so you cannot play safely behind it.

abilities.name: Claw Sweep
abilities.description: Long attack that breaks guard and launches you if you take it poorly.

abilities.name: Tail Whip
abilities.description: Used against players behind it and can connect multiple hits.

abilities.name: Tongue Lick
abilities.description: Short mid-range punish when you try to hover just outside its head.

bossPhases.label: Phase 3
bossPhases.trigger: In the final third it leans far more on spicy fire and closes off the arena much more often.
bossPhases.summary: The final phase mixes all of its heavy melee tools with spicy shots and fire breath. Space control matters more than ever here.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: Maximum pressure, fewer breathing windows and far more punishment if you do not close off escape routes correctly.
newPatterns: Eye shots and breath attacks add burning pressure and force constant movement.
Explosive damage remains one of the best ways to keep pressure in this phase.

abilities.name: Eye Spicy Shot
abilities.description: Fast shot from the eyes used to force lateral movement.

abilities.name: Fire Breath
abilities.description: Area-denial breath attack that covers space and finishes already-committed players.

specialTraits: It remains immune to environmental sizzle even in the final phase.
